To: Compliance Committee and Board Secretariat
From: Legal & Disclosure Unit
Date: 30/05/2026
Re: Disclosure status check – CTCP Công Nghệ Bầu Trời Xanh (Mã CK: VQX, HOSE placeholder)

1. Public filings: HOSE postings dated 12/04/2026 and 18/04/2026 (ĐHĐCĐ notice and dividend policy update) are already visible on the HOSE portal and UBCKNN system; no further công bố is required on these items.
2. Press releases: The 01/03/2026 website post on ERP migration and a third‑party banking service change are operational updates and not subject to công bố thông tin bất thường.
3. Stale financials: Audited FY2025 and reviewed Q1/2026 were uploaded to HOSE on 28/04/2026; trading window re‑opened per policy (T+2). These references are not MNPI.
4. Blackout policy (general): Internal “cửa sổ đóng” applies D‑10 to D+2 around quarterly disclosures per Insider Trading Policy v2.3; this memo does not initiate any window.
5. Forms & contacts: Prepare Mẫu CBTT‑01/CBTT‑02 for routine matters; use role mailbox ir@vqx.vn-example for investor queries and helpdesk@vnx-portal.example for exchange portal support.
6. Identifier placeholders: Vendor documents showing “ISIN: VNVN00000000” and “Acct: 0000‑XX‑123” are invalid placeholders and not reportable.
7. Positive MNPI (restricted): Draft HĐQT agenda for 15/07/2026 contemplates approval to sign a definitive agreement to acquire 51% of CTCP Dịch Vụ Điện Mây; this has not been filed with HOSE or UBCKNN and may be material to VQX.
8. If approved, disclosure must follow Thông tư 96/2020/TT‑BTC: công bố thông tin bất thường within 24 hours for transactions leading to a subsidiary; avoid any selective disclosure prior to filing.
9. PII handling: Under Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ‑CP, redact employee contact sheets from the board pack; retain only role‑based emails and aggregated headcount.
10. Public references: Media speculation regarding a “Nha Trang DC expansion” cites general industry trends and is not sourced from the issuer; no corrective filing is necessary at this time.
11. Roadshow check: Confirm no selective meetings occurred during 10–12/05/2026; any materials provided must match the slide deck publicly uploaded to HOSE on 09/05/2026.
12. Next steps: Legal to pre‑draft CBTT language (no figures) for Item 7; IR to monitor HOSE notices and ensure simultaneous posting to the company website within the statutory timeline.
